stemHtml: The identification of a DME in combination with a collocated VOR is as follows…

options.a: in a period of 40 seconds the DME ident will be heard once on an audio frequency of 1350 Hz.
options.b: every 30 seconds the DME ident will be repeated.
options.c: the VOR ident and DME ident are the same and no difference can be heard.
options.d: the DME ident will repeat three times every period of 30 seconds.
